tasks.title: Verify Gemini settings.json MCP exclusion syntax on a live member
tasks.notes: Research findings written to docs/research-219-gemini-mcp.md — identifies mismatch in config structure (install uses mcpServers, exclusion attempts mcp.excluded) and documents 3 questions requiring live member verification

tasks.title: Replace Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 with BOM-free write in deliverConfigFile()
tasks.notes: Replaced Set-Content with [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText() using System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false) to write UTF-8 without BOM

tasks.title: Fix MCP exclusion in composePermissionConfig() based on research
tasks.notes: Applied two-part fix based on live verification findings: (1) Added --allowed-mcp-server-names empty string flag to buildPromptCommand() to prevent any MCP servers from being used during prompts. (2) Changed settings from mcp.excluded (wrong) to mcpServers: {} to disable MCP servers per-project (overrides global registration). Updated tests to verify new behavior.

tasks.title: Unit tests for deliverConfigFile() BOM-free write
Unit tests for Gemini composePermissionConfig() MCP exclusion
